resources.string: Join 10,000+ users mastering their financial future.
Instant categorization with just a photo.
Deep dive into your portfolio & liabilities.
Never miss a budget threshold again.
Cancel subscription anytime in Google Play settings.
Your journey to financial freedom just got a whole lot smarter.
Used by 10,000+ users to achieve financial freedom
"This app completely changed how I manage my money. The AI coach is like having a financial advisor in my pocket."
Join Casha to take control of your finances and achieve your financial goals
By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
Enter your email address and we\'ll send you a link to reset your password
Choose the primary currency for your transactions. This selection cannot be changed later.
Currency already selected and cannot be changed
Search by code, name, or symbol...
Signup successful, please verify your email.
Couldn\'t process your request. Please try again.
Track your finances naturally! Tell me about your expenses, income, or payments.
Upgrade to Premium to unlock all features ✨
Choose how you\'d like to add a transaction
Please enter a valid amount greater than 0
An unknown error occurred. Please try again.
You have transactions waiting to sync since %1$s. They will sync automatically when online.
You have %1$d transaction(s) waiting to sync. They will sync automatically when online.
Are you sure you want to delete the %1$s budget? This action cannot be undone.
Please enter a different amount than the current budget
Please enter a valid amount greater than 0
All recommended budgets have been applied successfully.
AI analysis of your debts and assets to optimize your budget for a Debt-Free Strategy.
These amounts will be locked in the AI recommendation.
Are you sure you want to delete \'%s\'? This cannot be undone.
Tap + to start saving for your dreams
Track your debts, interests, and payments in one place
Please enter a valid credit limit
Please enter a valid interest rate
Please enter a valid interest rate
Please enter a valid credit limit
Please enter a valid principal amount
Are you sure you want to delete this liability?
Are you sure you want to delete this transaction? This action cannot be undone.
This transaction needs to be synced first before you can edit or delete it. Please sync your transactions from the dashboard.
Please enter a valid amount greater than 0
Selecting a tenor will convert this transaction into a monthly installment plan. This action cannot be undone.

Are you sure you want to delete your account?

This will permanently delete:
• All your transactions
• All your budgets
• All your settings
• Your profile data

This action cannot be undone.
Profile updates require an internet connection
Notifications you receive will appear here
Add assets to track your net worth over time
Product not available. Please try again later.
Unable to verify purchase. Please check your internet connection.
Purchase verification failed. Please contact support.
One-time payment. Unlimited access forever. No recurring fees.
Full access to all features. Cancel anytime. 3-day free trial.
All expenses neatly recorded in one place.
No long forms. Just tell me.
Your net cashflow\nRp2,5 Juta this month. 👏
From Rp15 Juta in, Rp12,5 Juta out
Weekends are your peak spending times
Monitor this trend to maintain your surplus
From morning coffee to freelance — nothing is missed.
Starbucks, Grab, to income entered automatically
Search transaction history as easily as chat
Rp7,9 Juta used\nof Rp10,4 Juta budget.
Rp2,5 Juta remaining — manage it before the month ends.
No need to check one by one. Casha summarizes it all.
Prices updated automatically, no manual refresh
Due on dates 15 & 25 — Casha reminds you on time.
Credit card Rp5,2 Juta used of Rp20 Juta
Total installments Rp2,2 Juta per month — tracked automatically
Overall progress 30% of Rp500 Juta target
Dream home Rp250 Juta saved — 25% achieved
Nearest deadline in 30 days — Holiday Fund
Track assets in IDR, USD, EUR, JPY, and more
See automatic estimates for paying off your debt
No simulation data available for this budget
Fill if installment started before using Casha
Choose the appropriate category to simplify recording and management.
